description:
This quiz evaluates a developer's proficiency with JavaScript's notoriously tricky native Date API, focusing on formatting, localization, and reducing reliance on third-party libraries. It presents an intermediate-to-advanced difficulty level with a playful, slightly sarcastic yet educational tone designed to both test and deepen practical knowledge.
Topics: JavaScript Date API, Native date formatting, Date localization, Third-party library alternatives
Audience: JavaScript and frontend developers seeking to master native date manipulation
